expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “What this benchmark is checking (phase4a focus)”, the output explicitly lists the required focus items: “Single embedding component planning” and “panel-stack composition”, “embedding lifecycle”, “regression-sensitive integration states”. It further elaborates in section “2) Phase4a structure supports the benchmark’s case focus...” with example subcategories and scenario types for each of those three areas.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The verdict states “Pass (advisory) for the phase4a contract alignment.” Result.md section “1) Phase4a is the correct primary alignment target” cites the workflow/contract: “spawn the subcategory-draft writer”, validation of “drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md”, and gates “validate_phase4a_subcategory_draft”, matching the expectation that the output aligns to Phase 4a.
